notes: Solid Asteroids implementation with proper wrapping, splitting, UFO, lives, waves, and audio; minor issue is lives display shows lives-1 icons (off-by-one) and wave clear doesn't check for UFO presence before advancing.

An absolutely flawless implementation of Asteroids, featuring perfect vector graphics, screen wrapping (with correct edge-rendering and collision), safe respawns, UFO logic, and Web Audio sound effects.

Solid Asteroids clone with waves, UFOs, wrapping, and scoring, but the title text incorrectly claims arrows/WASD rotate and thrust while Down is unused and controls are only partially explained, keeping it from top-tier accuracy.
